response.step_by_step_log: Identified VTuber Nakiri Ayame and Oozora Subaru. OCR on screen identified 'ひらひらひらら' (Hira Hira Hirari). Used search query '"ひらひらひらら" ClariS lyrics Japanese and English' to retrieve details and lyrics. Simplified artist to 'ClariS'. Compiled scene breakdown with talk and performance segments.
response.global_summary: A segment from Nakiri Ayame's 7th Anniversary 3D live, featuring an introductory talk followed by a musical performance of "Hira Hira Hirari" by Nakiri Ayame and guest performer Oozora Subaru.

scenes.description: Nakiri Ayame is talking, showing off her new 3D outfit and posing.
Nakiri Ayame and Oozora Subaru perform the song 'Hira Hira Hirari'.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
夢の中でも
花が散ってる
ひらひら舞う
暗闇に浮かぶ桜
水面に落ちたら
君はもう一度咲くのかな
桜月夜に宿る
いたずらな風
匂いだけ残して
騒ぎ出す
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Even in my dreams,
The flowers are scattering
Fluttering, fluttering
The cherry blossoms floating in the darkness
If they fall on the water surface
Will you bloom once more?
Even in the cherry blossom night
Mischievous wind, leaving only a scent
Startled, I woke up
